parts.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: What did the girl buy on her shopping trip?
Why did the plane leave late?
What activity does the woman want to book for the weekend?
Which cake will the girl order?
How much must customers spend to get a free gift?
What did the family do on Sunday?
Which programme is on first?

parts.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: What does the girl say about it?

options.label: It only has the latest fashions.
Prices are reduced at the moment.

questions.context: You will hear two friends talking about a new clothes shop.

questions.prompt: They think the site would be better if

options.label: its information was up to date.
it was easier to buy concert tickets.

questions.context: You will hear two friends talking about a pop band's website.

questions.prompt: How does she feel about it?

options.label: upset that the prize isn't valuable
excited that the judges liked her picture
disappointed that she can't use the prize

questions.context: You will hear a woman telling a friend about an art competition she's won.

questions.prompt: The girl thinks that her flatmate
questions.context: You will hear two friends talking about the girl's flatmate.

questions.prompt: They agree that their team lost because

options.label: they were missing some key players.
the players didn't do the right training.

questions.context: You will hear two friends talking about a football match.

questions.prompt: The boy wants the girl to
questions.context: You will hear two friends talking about a tennis match they played.

parts.instruction: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.

questions.prompt: National Gardens attraction
questions.gapTrail: was the thing that attracted most people.

questions.prompt: Swimming trip safety
questions.gapLead: On the swimming trip, electronic armbands kept the

questions.prompt: Countryside accident
questions.gapLead: On the day in the countryside, Anita almost fell off a

questions.prompt: Capital city theatre
questions.gapLead: In the capital city, Anita saw a

questions.prompt: Farm product
questions.gapLead: Anita enjoyed visiting a farm where

questions.prompt: Gifts

parts.audioIntro: You will hear a radio presenter called Anita talking about her holiday in Cuba.

parts.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: Vicky first went in for competitions because

options.label: she had joined a swimming club.
her parents were keen on swimming.

questions.prompt: As a teenager, Vicky's training involved

options.label: exercising on land as well as in the water.
going without meals during the day.
travelling to a pool once a day.

questions.prompt: What did Vicky find hard about her training programme?

options.label: She couldn't go on school trips.
She lost some of her friends.

questions.prompt: What helped Vicky to do well in the national finals?

options.label: She was not expected to win.
She wanted to take a cup home.

questions.prompt: As a swimming coach, Vicky thinks she's best at teaching people
Why has Vicky started doing long-distance swimming?

options.label: She needed to get fit again.
She thought it would be fun.
She wanted to do some travelling.

parts.audioIntro: You will hear an interview with a woman called Vicky Prince, a champion swimmer who now works as a swimming coach.
